name: Swaanng
overview: In a quiet hill town, two teenage slum-dwelling girls discover an abandoned DSLR. A young, passionate journalist visits the same town looking for his missing girlfriend. Their lives converge in unimaginable ways, as a series of abductions shake up, the quaint hamlet hinting at the presence of a vicious serial murderer who's targeting poor, vulnerable teenagers

trailers.title: Official Trailer: Swaanng | Hiten Tejwani, Anushka Sen, Mansi Srivastava, Alan Kapoor, Anurag Sharma
